entradas.original: God, what a smell! All these trees...!
entradas.traduzido: "Deus, que cheiro horrível! Todas essas árvores..."

entradas.original: Yeah.
The Earth can be really nasty, can't it?
entradas.traduzido: A Terra pode ser realmente desagradável, não é?

entradas.original: You'll get used to it.
Different from those \Nair-conditioned colonies, huh?
Um, what was your name again, Master Chief?
entradas.traduzido: Um, qual foi o nome de novo, Mestre Chefe?

entradas.original: Master Chief Karen Joshua, sir!
Gotcha. Master Chief Karen Joshua.
You been stationed here long?
entradas.traduzido: Você está aqui há muito tempo?

entradas.original: For 3 months, sir. What about it?
Nothing. Just curious.\NAnyway, pleased to meet you.
entradas.traduzido: Nada. Só curioso. \NDe qualquer forma, prazer em conhecê-lo.

entradas.original: Same here.
Mobile suits!
They're loaded for land battle!
entradas.traduzido: Eles estão carregados para a batalha terrestre!

entradas.original: Can I get one of those, too?! Cool!
entradas.traduzido: Sim, eu também quero um daqueles!

entradas.original: Ensign Shiro Amada reporting for duty...
entradas.traduzido: Sargento-veterano Eledore Joshua relatando para o dever...

entradas.original: ...in the 08th mobile suit team, sir!
Welcome. I'm battalion commander Kojima.
entradas.traduzido: Bem-vindos. Sou o comandante da 8ª Equipe MS, Kojima.

entradas.original: Please, take it easy.
God, I really hate air- conditioning, you know?
entradas.traduzido: "Deus, eu realmente odeio ar condicionado, você sabe?"

entradas.original: That's why I usually retreat out\Nhere during the day.
That officer? I hear he\Nwent after Zeon in a Ball.
Still, I can't believe the Team\NKiller is part of his group.
I'm sure you've all heard the reports...
entradas.traduzido: Estou certa que todos ouviram os relatórios...

entradas.original: ...that Zeon has established\Na secret factory in this area.
However, what they're doing\Nthere remains a mystery.
And due to the fact that their\Nfinal defense line...
entradas.traduzido: E devido ao fato que a sua \Ndefesa final está em risco...

entradas.original: ...is moving into our area,\Nwe've decided to make our move.
No matter what, we have to\Nbreak that defense line...
...and hit the enemy hard!
So, which one's Sanders the Reaper?
entradas.traduzido: "Qual deles é o Sanders, a Foice?"

entradas.original: Quit asking questions.\NYou'll just get in trouble.
entradas.traduzido: Não faça mais perguntas. \NVocê só vai se meter em encrenca.

entradas.original: Oh, and there are civilians\Nin the jungle as well.
entradas.traduzido: Oh, e tem civis \N também na selva.

entradas.original: Try not to stir them up.
Anyway, that's that.
If there's anything else, ask the Master Chief.
entradas.traduzido: "Se tem mais alguma coisa, pergunte ao Mestre Chefe."

entradas.original: Okay, Karen?
Yes!
C'mon, move aside! Make a hole!
Looks like the new commander's arrived.
entradas.traduzido: Parece que o novo comandante chegou.

entradas.original: Yeah, pretty much.
So, what's he like?
entradas.traduzido: E o que ele é como?

entradas.original: An unknown quantity at the moment.
Looks like you guys will\Nbe busy from now on.
...and that's basically the situation.
How about it, Pops?
Wanna bet how long he'll last?\NThe new commander.
Give the guy a chance, you damn fool!
entradas.traduzido: Dê uma chance para o cara, idiota!

entradas.original: Okay, you're on!
We're going out to back up the 06th Team!
entradas.traduzido: Estamos saindo para reforçar a Equipe 06!

entradas.original: Gimme a weapons and ammo check\Nand shake a leg on reloading!
Chief Sanders! You're in Unit 3!
Right!
Listen, Zeon isn't gonna come\Nvisit us when it's convenient.
entradas.traduzido: Ouça, Zeon não virá nos \Nvisitar quando for conveniente.

entradas.original: Pull that camo netting\Noff of Units 1 and 3!
Yes, yes!
She is so cool.
Excuse me. Where's my mobile suit?
entradas.traduzido: "Desculpe-me. Onde está o meu Mobile Suit?"

entradas.original: You're my support man, Kid.
You handle the gun on that as my assistant.
entradas.traduzido: Você lida com a arma como minha assistente.

entradas.original: Huh?! Assistant?
Don't catch that on the gun barrel!
entradas.traduzido: Não seja pego pelo cano da arma!

entradas.original: Unit 3's loaded with 100 millimeter!
entradas.traduzido: "Unidade 3 está carregada com munição de 100 milímetros!"

entradas.original: Cartridges are set, also!
Okay!
{\fad(0,227)}This is it...
This is my mobile suit.
Anything wrong, sir?
Oh, no.
It's in excellent condition,\NMaster Chief Joshua.
entradas.traduzido: "Está em excelente condição, \N, Mestre Chefe Joshua."

entradas.original: I'm honored, sir!
Now, before we move out...
...our commander has something\Nhe'd like to say to you.
I'm sorry I haven't had more of a\Nchance to get to know you all.
I'll just say this...\NWhatever happens, don't get killed.
I'll also be doing whatever it\Ntakes to see you don't die.
No matter how heroic you\Nmight be in a fight,
it doesn't mean anything\Nif you end up dying.
As your commander,
it's my job to see that everyone\Nin this unit makes it back alive.
entradas.traduzido: "É meu trabalho garantir que todos \Nnesta unidade voltem vivos."

entradas.original: It's my hope that we can all enjoy\Nvictory together when it comes.
That is all!
All hands, prepare to move out!\NDismissed!
Well, he talks the talk...
Now, care to show us\Nhow good you actually are?
entradas.traduzido: Agora, você quer nos mostrar \N quão bom você realmente é?

entradas.original: Show me a man who\Nwants to go and die!
entradas.traduzido: Mostre-me um homem que \N quer ir e morrer!

entradas.original: You're disappointing me,\NCommander Newbie.
But we know he's a good pilot!
entradas.traduzido: Mas nós sabemos que ele é um bom piloto!

entradas.original: We're about to find that out!
I hope we make it back alive.\NAll of us...
Sanders, you're on my right.\NJoshua, take left wing.
I'll take point.
entradas.traduzido: Vou assumir o ponto de ataque.

entradas.original: {\i1}Roger!
{\i1}08th Team, move out!
{\i1}Commander?
What?
We're about to leave our defense line.
entradas.traduzido: Estamos prestes a sair da nossa linha de defesa.

entradas.original: From here on, no radio\Ntransmissions are allowed.
{\i1}From here on, no radio\Ntransmissions are allowed.
I'm aware of that.
{\i0}All communications from here\Non are to be pointcast only!{\i}
{\i1}All communications from here\Non are to be pointcast only!{\i}
{\i1}Kill all lights!{\i0}
{\i1}Switch over to laser sensors\Nand IR on your monitors!{\i}
We'll see how long he can keep this act up...
entradas.traduzido: Vamos ver quanto tempo ele consegue segurar essa atitude...

entradas.original: It's close!
Kid, get Newbie on the line.
entradas.traduzido: Menino, faça o novato falar ao telefone.

entradas.original: R-Right!
And don't make a sound!
Bearing to 2 o'clock...
Range 2300. Two mobile suits.
Can you ID them?
Checking their profile...
Zakus!
What about the 06th Team?
entradas.traduzido: O que aconteceu com a Equipe 06?

entradas.original: You think they were wiped out?
entradas.traduzido: Você acha que eles foram dizimados?

entradas.original: {\i1}The enemy's still attacking.
They wouldn't be if they were wiped out.
entradas.traduzido: Eles não seriam se fossem eliminados.

entradas.original: Yeah, you're right.
I'll go and check it out!
He wants to play decoy, huh?
But are you good enough to do that?
entradas.traduzido: Mas você é bom o suficiente para fazer isso?

entradas.original: Here it comes!
Uh-oh! This isn't like space!
entradas.traduzido: "Ah, uai! Não é assim o espaço!"

entradas.original: Trying to get killed right\Nafter you got here?!
Heavy!
Kill your light!
Master Chief Joshua!\NWhat are you trying to do?!
entradas.traduzido: Mestre Chefe Joshua! \NO que você está tentando fazer?

entradas.original: {\i1}It's no good!
I'm saying your piloting skill\Nisn't up to this situation!
What?! Are you trying to insult me?!
entradas.traduzido: O que?! Você está tentando me insultar?!

entradas.original: {\i1}I don't care how you take it
I'll stop that guy! Just watch!
entradas.traduzido: "Eu vou parar aquele cara! Apenas espere!"

entradas.original: I'm not good enough to take on\Nthe enemy, huh? Well, fine!
Newbie's following the Zaku.
Karen's on the commander's ass.
Message from the commander!
He says he's going after the Zaku\Nto drive it out of our defense line!
Oh, that's just great.\NThis whole thing's totally FUBAR!
entradas.traduzido: Oh, isso é simplesmente fantástico. \NIsso tudo está totalmente fubar!

entradas.original: Get the Chief on the line!
Right!
I thought he said there were two Zakus.
entradas.traduzido: Pensei que ele disse que havia dois Zaku.

entradas.original: Commander!
He's in too close!
Chief Sanders!
{\i1}This doesn't handle like a GM at all!
So, this is what a Gundam's like...
entradas.traduzido: E assim é como um Gundam se parece...

entradas.original: Where is he?!
Commander! Don't go too deep!\NIt's dangerous!
entradas.traduzido: Comandante! Não vá muito fundo! \NÉ perigoso!

entradas.original: There he is!
You see? I got him!
Damn!
Shit!
Where'd he go?!
What a mess!
Eledore! Has the commander come back yet?
entradas.traduzido: Eledore, o comandante ja voltou ainda?

entradas.original: {\i1}Huh? I thought he was with you.{\i0}
What are you waiting for, Ninorich?!
entradas.traduzido: O que você está esperando, Michel?

entradas.original: Hurry up and find the commander!
Y-Yes, ma'am!
Commander! Ensign Amada!\NPlease respond on 3754!
entradas.traduzido: Comandante! Segundo-tenente Amada! \N Por favor, responda em 3754!

entradas.original: Maybe he's out taking a piss.
entradas.traduzido: Talvez ele esteja saindo para fazer xixi.

entradas.original: Dammit! Where? Where'd he go?!
Looks like he's out of detection range.
entradas.traduzido: Parece que ele está fora do alcance da detecção.

entradas.original: Should we send a rescue\Nteam out after him?
Are you stupid?
If you do that so soon\Nafter he gets here,
entradas.traduzido: Se você fizer isso logo \Ndepois que ele chegar.

entradas.original: he'll be the laughingstock of the base.
entradas.traduzido: ele será motivo de piada na base.

entradas.original: {\i1}Commander...{\i0}
Oh, great! The navigation\Nsystem's screwed up!
God dammit!
{\fad(0,1435)}Oh, that's just great...
If he's alive, he could at least\Nbroadcast a mayday...
If I stay in this thing, I'll drown\Nin my own sweat!
Oh man, it's hot...
It's barely dawn, but it's\Nalready so damn hot!
Lovely. Just lovely.
What the hell are these?!
What's with this place?!
And there are people\Nwho actually live here?!
entradas.traduzido: E tem gente\N que mora aqui de verdade?

entradas.original: I don't believe it.
I get an insubordinate master chief\Nand a smart-ass petty officer...!
entradas.traduzido: "Recebo um mestre chefe insubordinado\N e um oficial subalterno idiota..."

entradas.original: That's the stuff!
I feel alive again!
A... A girl?
Yeah, it is.
She's pretty.
I heard about that battle\Nyou were in 2 days ago.
Yes.
I heard the test unit was lost...\NWhy did you do it?
entradas.traduzido: Ouvi dizer que a unidade de teste foi perdida... \N Porque você fez isso?

entradas.original: One thing led to another. Besides that...
entradas.traduzido: Uma coisa levou a outra. Além disso...

entradas.original: My Apsaras, you mean?
Yes.
The prototype should be completed shortly.
entradas.traduzido: O protótipo deverá estar pronto em breve.

entradas.original: Then soon it'll be reality.\NYour dream, Big Brother.
No, it's not a dream anymore.\NOnce it's on the front line...
entradas.traduzido: Não, não é mais um sonho. \NUma vez que está na linha de frente...

entradas.original: ...it will change the war situation back to our favor.
entradas.traduzido: ...isso mudará a situação da guerra em nosso favor.

entradas.original: I heard Supreme Commander\NGihren's speech on my way here.
entradas.traduzido: Ouvi o discurso do Comandante Supremo \NGihren no caminho até aqui.

entradas.original: I want to help you any way I can,\NBig Brother.
entradas.traduzido: "Eu quero ajudar você de qualquer forma que eu puder, \N Big Brother."

entradas.original: Now that you're here, I feel more confident.
entradas.traduzido: Agora que você está aqui, eu me sinto mais confiante.

entradas.original: Uh-oh. Big Brother,\Nisn't it time for your medicine?
Right.
There it goes again!
Uh... no...! I was just, um...!
entradas.traduzido: Uh... não... Eu só estava, um...!

entradas.original: Cut it out! Don't shoot!
He's a Federation pilot?
entradas.traduzido: Sim, ele é um piloto da Federação.

entradas.original: She didn't have to just\Nstart shooting at me!
That guy from last night!
He's wandering around over there!\NAll right, then!
{\i1}Chief. Our relief is here.\NDo we wait any longer?{\i0}
We can't move until we get\Norders from the commander.
Not the most flexible guy, are you?
entradas.traduzido: Não é o mais flexível, não é?

entradas.original: {\i1}I have a personal debt to him.{\i}
So, you're the team killer,\NSanders the Reaper.
What?!
I looked at your record before.
You've shot down 6 enemy suits\Nwith your GM.
If your luck was different,\Nyou might be an officer now.
entradas.traduzido: Se sua sorte fosse diferente, \Nvocê poderia ser um oficial agora.

entradas.original: But I've got the higher rank here,\Nso I'll give the orders.
But...!
The commander said we were\Nto go back alive, right?
So we're going back!
One strike... I’ll stop you with one strike.
entradas.traduzido: Uma advertência... Eu vou parar você com uma advertência.

entradas.original: Now come and get me!
Calm down. Just calm down, Shiro.
Even clumsy pilots have\Nclumsy ways of fighting.
Now hurry up and get\Ninto my firing range!
entradas.traduzido: Agora apresse-se e entre \N no meu campo de tiro!

entradas.original: Here he comes!
I'll show you I've got the guts\Nfor this, Joshua! Just watch!
Even I can do this!
He still wants to fight?!
I did it, didn't I? Even here on the ground.
entradas.traduzido: Fiz isso, não é mesmo? Mesmo aqui no chão.

entradas.original: One kill down! Now I can go home!
entradas.traduzido: Uma morte a menos! Agora eu posso ir para casa!

entradas.original: Hey, Karen!
Did this guy only last one day?
entradas.traduzido: Esse cara durou apenas um dia?

entradas.original: Shouldn't have been so rough on him!
entradas.traduzido: Não deveria ter sido tão duro com ele!

entradas.original: Or maybe he was just cursed!
entradas.traduzido: Ou talvez ele tenha sido amaldiçoado!

entradas.original: {\i1}B.B., I've only just landed here on Earth...
{\i1}...and already I've had\Nmy first taste of battle!
{\i1}I wish you could have seen me fighting.
{\i0}But something really awful\Nhappened out there.{\i}
{\i1}Our commander got separated\Nfrom us and never came back.
{\i1}The Earth can be a harsh place.{\i0}
{\i1}I wonder if I'm really gonna\Nget through this alive...{\i0}
Hey, kid!
He's come back! Newbie's back!
Commander!
Man, I can hardly believe it.
He was like that in space, too.
entradas.traduzido: Ele era assim até no espaço.

entradas.original: Feel like taking a chance on his luck, now?
entradas.traduzido: Sentindo vontade de arriscar sua sorte agora?

entradas.original: I'm thankful that mobile\Nsuit's as good as it is.
Enough already...
{\i1}Our new orders are handed down.{\i0}
{\i1}We have to liberate a\NZeon-occupied village in the hills!{\i0}
{\i1}To take out the enemy's\Ngun emplacements...{\i0}
{\i1}...we split up to try a pincer attack.{\i0}
{\i1}But then I slip up and get\Ncaptured by guerillas...{\i0}
{\i1}...as the attack start time\Ndraws closer and closer!{\i0}
{\i1}I can't let my team die like dogs!{\i0}
{\i1}Somehow, I've got to escape!{\i0}
{\i1}Next time, on Mobile Suit Gundam\NThe 08th MS Team{\i0}
The Time Limit on Trust
entradas.traduzido: O limite de tempo para confiança.

entradas.original: {\fad(475,0)\blur1.5\i0\pos(985,327)\c&H181FA9&}MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM{\i1}
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Newborn in a corner of the endless blue sky...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The dream is there, and even though it may now be small...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}No matter how strong they may blow...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...or how icy they may be...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...those winds can never erase the dream that shines. Oh, no!
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The dream that shines inside your heart!
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...pull them close to me.{\fad(0,1000)}
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All that time that's passed me by.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}From childhood till now, so many days.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}When I look back, I see so many things...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...that happened to come into my life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The times I cried, the times I laughed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The times I fought, the times I dreamed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The lost loves that were sort of hard.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All shining in my history.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The ones who caused me pain...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...I met and left along the way.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}But I still ended up meeting you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The one that I love.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}10 years after, a decade from now.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Dez anos depois, daqui a uma década.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I wonder what I will be doing then.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I wonder how I will be still loving you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}10 years after, a decade from now.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Dez anos depois, daqui a uma década.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I still want to be looking at you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Stay together. When that day comes...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...I want to be at your side with a smile.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Aguente firme agora! Não a deixe ir embora.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Newborn in a corner of the endless blue sky...
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0} Um recém-nascido em um canto do infinito céu azul...

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The dream is there, and even though it may now be small...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}No matter how strong they may blow...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...or how icy they may be...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...those winds can never erase the dream that shines. Oh, no!
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The dream that shines inside your heart!
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Aguente firme agora! Não a deixe ir embora.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...pull them close to me.{\fad(0,1000)}
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All that time that's passed me by.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}From childhood till now, so many days.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}When I look back, I see so many things...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...that happened to come into my life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The times I cried, the times I laughed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The times I fought, the times I dreamed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The lost loves that were sort of hard.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All shining in my history.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The ones who caused me pain...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...I met and left along the way.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}But I still ended up meeting you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The one that I love.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I wonder what I will be doing then.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I wonder how I will be still loving you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I still want to be looking at you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Stay together. When that day comes...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...I want to be at your side with a smile.
{\blur1\pos(724.8,658.6)\c&HDEDEE3&}GUNDAMS IN THE JUNGLE
{\blur1\pos(720,650)\c&HDEDEE3&}THE TIME LIMIT ON TRUST
